name: Knott's Berry Farm
city: 8039 Beach Boulevard Buena Park, California 90620, U.S.
description: Knott's Berry Farm is a 57 acre amusement park in Buena Park, California, United States, owned and operated by Six Flags.  In March 2015, it was ranked as the twelfth-most-visited theme park in North America, while averaging approximately 4 million visitors per year.  The park features over 40 rides, including roller coasters, family rides, dark rides, and water rides.
